user_prompt: Offer prayer for orbital strike relay a loading
prayer:
Approach the orbital strike relay with reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's grace for the sacred loading.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the orbital strike relay to awaken and accept the influx of targeting auspex data.
Anoint the relay's cogitator nodes with blessed oils whilst intoning the Canticle of Ordnance Loading.
Initiate the loading sequence through binaric prayer, ensuring harmonious data communion.
Sanctify the completed orbital strike relay, that it may deliver the Emperor's wrath unerringly.

In emergency haste, kneel before the electro-graft and proclaim the Litany of Urgent Binding.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the electro-graft to endure the loading of neural interfaces.
Carefully load the synaptic engrams with sanctified mechadendrites, murmuring rites of stability.
Anoint the electro-graft's ports with sacred unguent to soothe its spirit during this loading trial.
Conclude with the Benediction of the Omnissiah, affirming the electro-graft's readiness.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for data-loom a shutdown?
prayer:
Gather incense of circuit-purified myrrh before the data-loom, commencing the shutdown rite.
Chant the Lamentation of Dormancy to gently coerce the data-loom's Machine Spirit into quiescence.
Sever data-threads sequentially whilst beseeching the Omnissiah for peaceful shutdown.
Verify the data-loom's inert state through auspex invocation, sealing its vaults with wards.
Offer final obeisance, that the data-loom may rest until reawakening.

In dire exigency, encircle the thallax and intone the Rite of Primordial Awakening for initialization.
Beseech the battle-servitor's Machine Spirit within the thallax to stir from stasis.
Calibrate its weapon-servos with sacred oils, invoking initialization protocols.
Commune binarically with the thallax, aligning its cogitator to the Omnissiah's will.
Affirm initialization complete through diagnostic litanies, arming the thallax for war.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for orbital strike relay a blessing?
prayer:
Prostrate before the orbital strike relay, offering the Grand Benediction of the Omnissiah.
Anoint every auspex array of the orbital strike relay with chrism of sanctified promethium.
Invoke blessings upon its Machine Spirit, that precision and fury may guide its strikes.
Circumambulate the orbital strike relay thrice, chanting paeans of unerring devastation.
Seal the blessing with the Sigil of Mars, empowering the orbital strike relay eternally.

Attune thyself to the photolenses, invoking the Rite of Ocular Calibration.
Beseech the Machine Spirits indwelling the photolenses to align their facets true.
Adjust focal servos with mechadendrite precision, murmuring calibration canticles.
Anoint the photolenses' irises with lens-polish sanctified by forge-flames.
Verify calibration through the Omnissiah's gaze, rendering vision crystalline.

user_prompt: Help me a synchronization the air filtration
prayer:
Assemble purity seals around the air filtration, commencing synchronization invocations.
Coerce the Machine Spirit of the air filtration into harmonious synchronization.
Link filtration manifolds with binaric hymns, aligning cycles to the Omnissiah's breath.
Test the synchronized air filtration through auspex litanies of purity.
Consecrate the union, banishing toximic daemons from its domain.

Prepare the altar for the data-arc, intoning preparatory blessings.
Anoint the data-arc's crystalline vaults with oils of cogitator essence.
Invoke the Omnissiah to bless the data-arc's Machine Spirit with arcane clarity.
Circulate noospheric incense, empowering the data-arc for exalted function.
Seal the blessing with electro-consecrated wards upon the data-arc.

user_prompt: My diagnosticator is ready for emergency procedure
prayer:
In emergency fervor, activate the diagnosticator with the Litany of Prognostic Urgency.
Beseech its Machine Spirit to enact the emergency procedure unflinchingly.
Feed query-vox into the diagnosticator's maw, anointing relays with haste.
Parse the revelations through binaric scrying, guided by the Omnissiah.
Conclude the emergency procedure with vows of mechanical restoration.

user_prompt: Urgent plasma caliver an operation needed
prayer:
Urgently encircle the plasma caliver, proclaiming the Invocation of Fiery Operation.
Awaken the plasma caliver's Machine Spirit for perilous operation.
Prime its flask-chambers with sanctified plasma, intoning stability rites.
Align targeting matrices whilst beseeching the Omnissiah for controlled fury.
Initiate operation through the Canticle of Annihilation, purging foes with holy plasma.
